items.title: US, UK and Australia to develop underwater drone technology
items.summary: The technology, developed under the Aukus military pact, is aimed at protecting undersea cables and boosting naval defence.

items.title: No deal announced after Trump meeting to make 'final determination' on Iran
items.summary: The US president met his advisers, after officials confirmed the US and Iran had agreed a framework of a deal.

items.title: Italy bans Kanye West and Travis Scott concerts over security concerns
items.summary: Local authorities say the cancellation of other West concerts had played a role in the decision.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 甘比亞籍貨輪違反封鎖駛向伊朗　遭美軍飛彈癱瘓
items.summary: 美國中央司令部（CENTCOM）今天宣布，美軍昨天向一艘試圖駛往伊朗、懸掛甘比亞國旗的貨輪發射飛彈，擊中輪機艙，使船隻失去動力。  綜合美國有線電視新聞網（CNN）和法新社報導，負責美軍在中...…

items.title: 「香格里拉對話」觸及台海海纜遭破壞  澳洲防長示警：海床已成戰場
items.summary: 包括新加坡、澳洲、紐西蘭、法國、芬蘭、瑞典等17個國家，30日在國防論壇「香格里拉對話」上，同意在海底電纜等關鍵海洋基礎設施的防禦策略上合作。澳洲國防部長馬勒斯以波羅的海和台灣...…

items.title: 破冰？CIA局長前腳剛走 美軍南方司令會見古巴副參謀長
items.summary: 美軍南方司令部司令唐納文（Francis L Donovan）週五（29日）罕見到古巴境內的關達那摩灣（Guantanamo Bay）美軍基地，會晤古巴軍方高層，討論邊界安全與維...…
